hotNews.title: Hot News
hotNews.subtitle: Featured · AI-curated high-value stories · {count} on this page

story.crossSource: {count} other source{count, plural, one {} other {s}} also reported this

hkr.h: H · Happy — opens a curiosity gap worth clicking
hkr.k: K · Knowledge — a new mechanism, number, or testable claim
hkr.r: R · Resonance — hits identity / sparks conversation

iteration.title: Policy Iterations
iteration.subtitle: Real editor feedback rewrites the curation policy. This panel pulls feedback, drafts a new version, reviews the diff, and rolls back.
iteration.readinessHeadline: Enough input to start a new draft
iteration.readinessDescription: {count} feedback items accumulated. Run one iteration, then review the diff + version history before shipping.

metrics.totalFeedbackNote: Enough to drive the next iteration

recent.title: Recent feedback
recent.empty: No feedback yet — 👍 / 👎 a story from the feed to populate this panel.

console.title: Iteration console
console.subtitle: The agent reads feedback and drafts a Skill update. It refuses to run when there is no feedback.

lines.procedureStart: Following workflow. First, read the current Skill file.
lines.awaitingReview: Draft ready — review the change preview below
lines.refused: Not enough feedback, refusing to iterate ({count}/{min})

diff.title: Change preview
diff.empty: No draft yet. Click "Start new draft" to have the agent read feedback and propose a new version.
diff.toast: Policy updated to v{version}. Next enrichment pass will use it.

sources.title: Sources
sources.subtitle: Every site and API that feeds content into the radar

podcasts.title: Podcasts / Video
podcasts.subtitle: Long-form podcast + YouTube interviews — {count} items with transcripts + editor commentary
podcasts.empty: No podcast items yet — transcripts are being fetched, check back after the next cron tick

detail.noTranscript: Transcript isn't available yet — YouTube didn't expose captions for this episode, or Jina Reader hasn't picked it up.

lowFollower.title: Low-follower Viral
lowFollower.subtitle: High-engagement posts from small accounts — early signal before the mainstream.

xMonitor.title: X Monitor
xMonitor.subtitle: Original posts from watched X accounts — {count} on this page (retweets + replies filtered)
xMonitor.empty: No X content yet — the next hourly cron tick will pull from the 7 watched accounts

login.title: Sign in to AX's AI RADAR
login.subtitle: Drop your email — we'll send a one-time sign-in link. Admins in the allowlist get into the backoffice the same way.

sent.title: Check your inbox
sent.body: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it on this device to complete sign-in.

errors.missing_code: The sign-in link is incomplete — please open it from the original email.
errors.callback_failed: That sign-in link has expired or already been used — request a new one.
errors.fallback: Something went wrong signing you in — please try again.

forbidden.title: Not authorised
forbidden.body: You're signed in, but {email} isn't on the admin allowlist. If you maintain this site, check the ALLOWED_ADMIN_EMAILS env var.

common.comingSoonDescription: This module is under construction — shipping in a later release.
